---
title: "AEM 6850"
pagetitle: "AEM 6850 · Empirical Methods for Applied Economists"
---

::: {.aem-hero}
<p class="hero-eyebrow">AEM 6850</p>

<h1 class="hero-title">Empirical Methods for Applied Economists</h1>

<p class="hero-tagline">
A graduate course at Cornell on empirical methods for applied economics
research — taught by
<a href="https://arielortizbobea.github.io">Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea</a>,
Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management.
</p>
:::

::: {.offerings-label}
Offerings
:::

::: {.offerings}
<a class="offering" href="fall-2026/index.html">
  <span><span class="term">Fall 2026</span><span class="dates">Coming soon</span></span>
  <span class="badge current">Upcoming</span>
</a>
:::
